views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing total plant count, today's watering count, care streak, average health score, a progress ring for daily care goal, and overdue plant alerts with quick-water FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick watering entry modal with plant name (auto-suggests from history), location picker, water amount selector, health rating slider, fertilize/mist toggles, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap showing watering activity density by day, with a date-grouped detail list filterable by individual plant name

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Per-plant watering frequency bar charts, health trend line chart over 30 days, care consistency score gauge, location-based health comparison, and generated care insights list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayWateringCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of distinct plants watered today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniquePlantCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total unique plant names across all historical entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: plantsWateredToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Deduplicated list of plant names with an entry logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive calendar days with at least one watering entry logged, ending today or yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyWateringCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total watering entries logged in the current Monday-through-Sunday week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (this week count - last week count) / last week count. Positive means more active.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageHealthRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean of the most recent healthRating entry per unique plant. Ranges 1.0–5.0.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: healthTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between average health rating of entries in last 15 days vs prior 15 days. Positive means improving.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostNeglectedPlant
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Plant name with the longest gap between its last watering entry and today. Nil if no entries exist.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: daysSinceLastWateringByPlant
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each unique plant paired with days since its most recent watering, sorted descending by days (most overdue first)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, count) for the past 7 days representing daily watering entry totals for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: fertilizerDueList
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Plant names whose most recent entry with fertilized=true is more than 30 days ago, or have never been fertilized

viewModelComputedProperties.name: careConsistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0–100 score. For each plant, compute stdev of intervals between waterings; lower variance = higher score. Averaged across all plants.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: locationBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of unique plants grouped by PlantLocation rawValue, sorted descending for bar/pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of human-readable insight strings dynamically generated from computed stats (overdue alerts, health warnings, fertilizer reminders, location comparisons, streak celebrations)

dailyGoal.description: Number of plants that should be watered today, computed by checking each plant's average watering interval and whether it is due. Plants are 'due' when daysSinceLastWatering >= averageInterval for that plant.
dailyGoal.defaultValue: Water all plants that are due based on their individual historical watering intervals

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day is active if at least one watering entry was logged. The streak counts consecutive active days backward from today (or yesterday if today has no entries yet). Missing a single day resets the streak to zero.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track three trend dimensions: (1) Weekly watering frequency compared to 4-week rolling average — flags if current week is below 70% of average. (2) Per-plant health rating trajectory using linear regression over last 10 entries — flags plants with negative slope exceeding -0.3 per entry. (3) Watering interval regularity per plant — compute coefficient of variation of intervals; CV > 0.5 flags inconsistent care.
insights: Overdue alert: '{plantName} was last watered {N} days ago — {X} days past its usual interval of {Y} days'
Health decline: '{plantName} health has dropped from {old} to {new} over the last {N} entries — check for pests or light issues'
Fertilizer reminder: '{plantName} hasn't been fertilized in {N} days — most houseplants benefit from monthly feeding during growing season'
Location comparison: 'Plants on your {location} average {rating} health vs {otherLocation} at {otherRating} — consider relocating struggling plants'
Consistency praise: 'Your care consistency score is {score}/100 this month — {change} from last month'
Seasonal tip: 'Winter months (Nov–Feb): most houseplants need 30–50% less water. Consider extending intervals.'
Misting reminder: '{plantName} hasn't been misted in {N} days — tropical plants benefit from regular misting'
Streak celebration: '{N}-day care streak! Your longest streak was {max} days — keep it going!'
